---
name: mock-review
description: Review a mock test or question set and convert mistakes into next actions.
agent: hpcl-prep
---

Review the submitted mock or question set using the relevant exam folder plus the shared-core notes.

Return:

- score summary
- mistake categories
- weak areas by topic
- next 3 repair actions
- exact brain files that should be updated if the result changes the prep state, including `.brain/NextSteps.md` when the immediate repair order changes
